findings.description: No explicit error handling for invalid input in the prompt method
Implicit assumption: `prompts_dir` is set to a relative path, but not validated for existence or accessibility
Potential security issue: `base_ref` is set to `HEAD~1`, which could lead to outdated dependencies

interfaces_consumed: garlicpress/cli.py:_get_client(api_key: str | None, base_url: str | None) -> LLMClient

implicit_assumptions.assumption: The existence and accessibility of `prompts_dir` are silently assumed to be true
implicit_assumptions.risk: Error in prompt generation or retrieval

cross_file_flags: config.py assumes LLMClient is available in garlicpress/client.py — verify in client.py findings
